jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - SAIL - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, SAIL in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SAIL:
SAIL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL!
